violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (robot coupe bowl, and ice bin at the bar) were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose all the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The dishwasher at the bar was not in good repair, not turned on during inspection due to leak. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. It currently has an air break. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

A wall, floor, and baseboards in the toilet room/mop room/hot water tank room are in poor repair, with holes in the wall and rotted baseboard. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed outside the kitchen door. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The inside of the walk in cooler has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

The floor and wall junctures in the toilet room/mop room/hot water tank room do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
Ceiling tiles in the back storage area is in poor repair, stained with previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Establishment needs a designated area for employee belonging. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
